// reporters: NonStaticInnerCapturesOuter.java.txt#Outer.reportInstance
package com.consumer.staticnest;

// Existing behavior, pinned: a non-static inner class keeps an implicit
// reference to its enclosing instance, so a bare call reaching an instance
// method the outer type declares is a real capture - stays clean.
class Outer {
    void reportInstance(Throwable cause) {}

    class Inner {
        void m() {
            try {
                risky();
            } catch (Exception e) {
                reportInstance(e);
            }
        }

        void risky() throws Exception {}
    }
}
